headline: D.R. Horton (DHI): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, D.R. Horton’s shares (currently trading at $142.17) have posted a disappointing 16.2% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 1% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
